Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed after the execution of SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time for SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week across all process variants containing it
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and the end of the case

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week when followed by SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week to SW-Reviewer Selection is now due
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-Reviewer Agreed after SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Total time it takes SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week to transition to any reviewer response activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, SW-Reviewer Unavailable, SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that reach final editorial decisions
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'

Name: Time of SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week relative to the preceding Manuscript Export Succeeded event
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and the next occurrence of Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Minimum time it takes the SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week to be followed by a change in editor assignment (Assign a Different Editor or Unassign Editor)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'Assign a Different Editor'

Name: Cycle Time of SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week measured as the duration until the first subsequent reviewer action (agreement, decline, unavailability, or no response)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'
